## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test`, or explained why not.
- [ ] I added or updated tests, or explained why tests are not applicable.
- [ ] I documented user-visible behavior changes.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, local settings, private data, or customer data.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes are called out clearly.
